properties.name: encryption.secret-key
properties.description: 32-byte hex-encoded AES secret key used by AesEncryptionConverter.

properties.name: rate-limit.transfer.capacity
properties.description: Maximum number of tokens in the transfer rate-limit bucket.

properties.name: rate-limit.transfer.refill-tokens
properties.description: Number of tokens added per refill period.

properties.name: rate-limit.transfer.refill-seconds
properties.description: Refill period in seconds for the transfer rate-limit bucket.
